description: Overhaul Team Analysis Summary and lineup presentation by simplifying display-only analysis output, improving recommended lineup layout, resolving lineup role species names, and reordering optimizer score breakdown fields.

userStories.title: Resolve lineup role species names in generate-team API
userStories.description: As a user, I want recommended lineup lead, switch, and closer entries to show species names instead of internal IDs so that lineup recommendations are readable.
acceptanceCriteria: Update app/api/generate-team/route.ts so recommended lineup lead, switch, and closer role values are resolved to species names before reaching the UI
Species-name resolution follows the existing approach used for lineup weakness names
Existing lineup weakness species-name behavior is preserved
Add or update relevant Vitest coverage for role species-name resolution
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: @backend-developer implement route/data mapping; @api-designer review response contract and backward compatibility; @frontend-developer verify UI consumes names without extra client mapping.

userStories.title: Remove Roster Metrics display and unused display-only generation
userStories.description: As a user, I want the team display to omit Roster Metrics so that the analysis view is less cluttered.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove the Roster Metrics output display from TeamDisplay.tsx
Remove code that generates Roster Metrics display values when those values have no remaining consumer
Do not delete internal optimizer/domain scoring calculations in lib/genetic/fitness/rosterScoring.ts unless proven unused outside display generation
Add or update relevant Vitest coverage for removed display-only output where applicable
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: @frontend-developer remove TeamDisplay UI; @backend-developer audit display-value generation; @api-designer review whether API payload fields should be removed or retained.

userStories.title: Simplify recommended lineup card content
userStories.description: As a user, I want recommended lineup cards to focus on role assignments and matchup details without extra score or shield strategy labels.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove Score from the recommended lineup card display
Remove Balanced, Shield spend, and Shield save display from recommended lineup cards
Remove display-only generation for Balanced, Shield spend, and Shield save values when unused by remaining consumers
Do not delete internal lineup scoring calculations in lib/genetic/fitness/lineupScoring.ts unless proven unused outside display generation
Add or update relevant Vitest coverage for simplified lineup card data where applicable
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: @frontend-developer simplify AnalysisPanel lineup card UI; @backend-developer audit and prune unused display-only generation; @api-designer review removed display fields.

userStories.title: Remove unused Per-Pokemon Contribution explanatory sections
userStories.description: As a user, I want the Per-Pokemon Contribution section to be concise and avoid redundant grading and rationale text.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove the Fitness Contribution Categories section from the analysis UI
Remove the Relative grading guide from Per-Pokemon Contribution
Remove per-Pokemon contribution rationale text from the UI
Remove generation of Fitness Contribution Categories and contribution rationale only when no remaining consumer exists
Update lib/analysis/pokemonContributionAnalysis.ts only for display-only rationale generation that is no longer consumed
Add or update relevant Vitest coverage for contribution analysis output changes

Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: @frontend-developer update AnalysisPanel contribution UI; @backend-developer audit pokemonContributionAnalysis generation; @api-designer review contribution payload shape.

userStories.title: Convert Recommended Lineups to analysis accordion section
userStories.description: As a user, I want Recommended Lineup(s) presented as an accordion matching the Summary Statistics and Per-Pokemon Contribution style so that analysis sections are visually consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Convert Recommended Lineup(s) in AnalysisPanel.tsx into an accordion section
Recommended Lineup(s) accordion has similar look and feel to Summary Statistics and Per-Pokemon Contribution
Move Recommended Lineup(s) below Summary Statistics
Accordion expanded/collapsed behavior works consistently with adjacent analysis sections
Existing recommended lineup data remains visible inside the accordion when expanded
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: @frontend-developer implement accordion placement and behavior; @ui-designer review visual consistency, spacing, hierarchy, and responsive behavior.

userStories.title: Reorder Optimizer Score Breakdown fields
userStories.description: As a user, I want the Optimizer Score Breakdown ordered so that offensive and defensive ratios are compared side-by-side before role information.
acceptanceCriteria: Update Optimizer Score Breakdown display order so Offensive Ratio and Defensive Ratio are side-by-side
Display Role after Offensive Ratio and Defensive Ratio
Preserve existing values and labels other than the requested ordering
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: @frontend-developer update display order in AnalysisPanel.tsx; @ui-designer review side-by-side layout and readability.

userStories.title: Remove structure from recommended lineup cards
userStories.description: As a user, I want recommended lineup cards to show only the lineup roles and remaining useful matchup details so that the card stays concise.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove Structure from the Recommended Lineups card display
Do not remove or alter internal diagnosticLabel generation unless no remaining consumer exists
Recommended Lineups still display Lead, Switch, Closer, and Weaknesses when expanded

Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Replace Summary Statistics content with optimizer score cards
userStories.description: As a user, I want the Summary Statistics section to show optimizer score breakdown cards so that the highest-level summary uses the same metrics as the optimizer explanation.
acceptanceCriteria: Keep the accordion section header text Summary Statistics
Replace the current Summary Statistics body content with Optimizer Score Breakdown information
Overwrite the existing Summary Statistics metric content rather than appending optimizer score cards below the current summary metrics

Remove this description from the UI: Normalized optimizer categories explain the generated score in priority order. Range labels are shown with colors so category strength is not communicated by color alone.
Do not recompute optimizer score values in client components; continue consuming API-provided scoreBreakdown data
Add or update relevant AnalysisPanel Vitest coverage for the Summary Statistics content replacement
